race.comment: BARBRA (2) was well in commission last time out but could only manage to finish seventh over 1050m at Toowoomba in a disappointing performance. This looks to suit her much better and she is a winner at this track and trip in the past. Can get back to winning ways. MISHANI STELLER (8) has not raced since finishing sixth over 1400m at Gatton on February 10. Can feature fresh. TAYLOR'S RAGE (10) resumes and has to be considered if any of the good form from last campaign emerges here. EXOSTOVA (1) should appreciate this level of racing today and while he is untested on the heavy deck, the drop back in trip may prove the key.
